title: Pyramid Texts, Utterance 759
description: Utterance 759 of the Pyramid Texts — the oldest religious texts in the world.
introduction: Utterance 759 of the Pyramid Texts — the oldest religious texts in the world.

translation.text: The final utterance: 'O King, you are not gone dead, you are gone alive. Sit upon the throne of Osiris, that you may give orders to the living forever.'
